positive: A minimalist, continuous line illustration featuring stylized forest fauna and flora. The main subject is a majestic stag head silhouetted by abstract geometric woodland elements (deer antlers, ferns, stylized mushrooms, crescent moons). The composition should be highly symmetrical and centralized, suitable for a repeating pattern or a central apparel graphic. Style: modern geometric linocut mixed with clean botanical etching. Use a monochrome palette of rich forest green, deep navy blue, and warm cream/off-white. Lighting: flat, even, high-contrast, emphasizing the silhouette. Ideal for screen printing on fabric. Vector art quality, negative space utilized prominently.
negative: photorealism, realistic, logo, text, blurry, artifacts, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, gradient, smudge, low detail
